_note: First-party Aleph official extensions. Hand-curated, trust_tier=official. Built into the catalog by scripts/pipeline/firstParty.ts, bypassing source discovery (these are subdir leaves of the Aleph repos, not standalone repositories). Provenance: each entry links to its real upstream tree URL.

entries.name: API Design
entries.description_en: Contract-first API design — REST/GraphQL conventions, error handling, versioning
entries.description_zh: 契约优先的 API 设计 — REST/GraphQL 规范、错误处理与版本管理
entries.long_en: Guides contract-first API design with REST and GraphQL conventions, consistent error envelopes, pagination, and versioning strategies.
entries.long_zh: 以契约优先的方式设计 API，涵盖 REST 与 GraphQL 规范、统一错误信封、分页与版本演进策略。
entries.sec_note_en: Advisory skill — produces design guidance only; no code execution.
entries.sec_note_zh: 纯建议型技能 — 仅产出设计指导，不执行任何代码。

entries.name: Architecture
entries.description_en: System architecture design — pattern selection, dependency analysis, visualization
entries.description_zh: 系统架构设计 — 模式选型、依赖分析与可视化
entries.long_en: Helps select architectural patterns, analyze module dependencies, and visualize system structure before implementation.
entries.long_zh: 在动手实现前帮助选择架构模式、分析模块依赖并将系统结构可视化。
entries.sec_note_en: Advisory skill — produces design guidance only; no code execution.
entries.sec_note_zh: 纯建议型技能 — 仅产出设计指导，不执行任何代码。

entries.name: CI/CD
entries.description_en: CI/CD pipeline design — GitHub Actions templates, caching, secret management
entries.description_zh: CI/CD 流水线设计 — GitHub Actions 模板、缓存与密钥管理
entries.long_en: Designs CI/CD pipelines with ready-to-use GitHub Actions templates, dependency caching, and secret-handling guidance.
entries.long_zh: 设计 CI/CD 流水线，提供可直接使用的 GitHub Actions 模板、依赖缓存与密钥处理指南。
entries.sec_note_en: Generates pipeline configs; review secret-handling steps before applying to real repositories.
entries.sec_note_zh: 生成流水线配置；应用到真实仓库前请审查密钥处理步骤。

entries.name: Code Review
entries.description_en: Multi-dimensional code review with confidence-based filtering
entries.description_zh: 多维度代码审查，基于置信度过滤问题
entries.long_en: Reviews code across correctness, security, and quality dimensions, surfacing only high-confidence findings to cut noise.
entries.long_zh: 从正确性、安全性与质量多个维度审查代码，仅呈现高置信度问题以降低噪声。
entries.sec_note_en: Read-only review — reports findings; does not modify code or execute it.
entries.sec_note_zh: 只读审查 — 报告问题，不修改代码也不执行代码。

entries.name: Computer Use: Book Flight
entries.description_en: Book a flight by driving a browser/desktop app end-to-end
entries.description_zh: 通过端到端操控浏览器/桌面应用完成订机票
entries.long_en: Drives a browser or desktop app to search and book flights end-to-end via computer-use automation.
entries.long_zh: 借助 computer-use 自动化操控浏览器或桌面应用，端到端地搜索并预订航班。
entries.sec_note_en: Controls a real browser/desktop and can submit bookings — run only in a supervised, sandboxed environment.
entries.sec_note_zh: 会操控真实浏览器/桌面并可能提交订单 — 仅应在受监督的沙箱环境中运行。

entries.name: Computer Use: Book Hotel
entries.description_en: Reserve a hotel room by driving a booking site end-to-end
entries.description_zh: 通过端到端操控预订网站完成订酒店
entries.long_en: Drives a booking site end-to-end to search and reserve hotel rooms via computer-use automation.
entries.long_zh: 借助 computer-use 自动化端到端操控预订网站，搜索并预订酒店房间。
entries.sec_note_en: Controls a real browser/desktop and can submit bookings — run only in a supervised, sandboxed environment.
entries.sec_note_zh: 会操控真实浏览器/桌面并可能提交订单 — 仅应在受监督的沙箱环境中运行。

entries.name: Computer Use: Draw
entries.description_en: Drive a desktop drawing app/web canvas to produce a sketch
entries.description_zh: 操控桌面绘图应用/网页画布生成草图
entries.long_en: Controls a desktop drawing app or web canvas to produce sketches through computer-use automation.
entries.long_zh: 通过 computer-use 自动化操控桌面绘图应用或网页画布来生成草图。
entries.sec_note_en: Controls a real desktop/browser — run only in a supervised, sandboxed environment.
entries.sec_note_zh: 会操控真实桌面/浏览器 — 仅应在受监督的沙箱环境中运行。

entries.name: Computer Use: UI-TARS Format
entries.description_en: Drive desktop with UI-TARS-style normalized coordinates
entries.description_zh: 以 UI-TARS 风格的归一化坐标操控桌面
entries.long_en: Drives the desktop using UI-TARS-style normalized coordinate actions for grounded GUI automation.
entries.long_zh: 使用 UI-TARS 风格的归一化坐标动作操控桌面，实现可定位的 GUI 自动化。
entries.sec_note_en: Controls a real desktop/browser — run only in a supervised, sandboxed environment.
entries.sec_note_zh: 会操控真实桌面/浏览器 — 仅应在受监督的沙箱环境中运行。

entries.name: Data Pipeline
entries.description_en: Data processing/transformation via jq and Python
entries.description_zh: 通过 jq 与 Python 进行数据处理与转换
entries.long_en: Builds data processing and transformation flows using jq and Python for cleaning, reshaping, and aggregation.
entries.long_zh: 使用 jq 与 Python 构建数据处理与转换流程，完成清洗、重塑与聚合。
entries.sec_note_en: Runs jq/Python on your data; validate untrusted inputs before processing.
entries.sec_note_zh: 会在你的数据上运行 jq/Python；处理不可信输入前请先校验。

entries.name: Database
entries.description_en: Database design — selection tree, schema, query optimization, migrations
entries.description_zh: 数据库设计 — 选型决策、模式、查询优化与迁移
entries.long_en: Guides database selection, schema design, query optimization, and migration planning across relational and NoSQL stores.
entries.long_zh: 指导关系型与 NoSQL 存储的数据库选型、模式设计、查询优化与迁移规划。
entries.sec_note_en: Can generate migration/DDL statements — review before running against production data.
entries.sec_note_zh: 可能生成迁移/DDL 语句 — 在生产数据上执行前请审查。

entries.name: Debug
entries.description_en: Systematic debugging — 7-step protocol with POE-aligned success contracts
entries.description_zh: 系统化调试 — 7 步协议与 POE 对齐的成功契约
entries.long_en: Applies a systematic 7-step debugging protocol with explicit, verifiable success contracts to isolate and fix root causes.
entries.long_zh: 采用系统化的 7 步调试协议，配合明确可验证的成功契约，定位并修复根因。
entries.sec_note_en: Advisory/process skill — guides investigation; you run the actual commands.
entries.sec_note_zh: 建议/流程型技能 — 引导排查，实际命令由你执行。

entries.name: Deploy
entries.description_en: Deployment lifecycle — containerization, release strategies, monitoring, rollback
entries.description_zh: 部署生命周期 — 容器化、发布策略、监控与回滚
entries.long_en: Covers the deployment lifecycle: containerization, release strategies, monitoring hooks, and safe rollback procedures.
entries.long_zh: 覆盖部署生命周期：容器化、发布策略、监控接入与安全回滚流程。
entries.sec_note_en: Produces deployment actions that can affect live environments — review before applying.
entries.sec_note_zh: 会产出可能影响线上环境的部署操作 — 应用前请审查。

entries.name: Doc
entries.description_en: Documentation co-authoring — 3-stage workflow (RFC, ADR, README, specs)
entries.description_zh: 文档协作撰写 — 三阶段工作流（RFC、ADR、README、规格）
entries.long_en: Co-authors technical documentation through a 3-stage workflow spanning RFCs, ADRs, READMEs, and specs.
entries.long_zh: 通过三阶段工作流协作撰写技术文档，涵盖 RFC、ADR、README 与规格说明。
entries.sec_note_en: Advisory skill — produces documentation only; no code execution.
entries.sec_note_zh: 纯建议型技能 — 仅产出文档，不执行任何代码。

entries.name: Email
entries.description_en: Email automation — send/receive via curl SMTP/IMAP
entries.description_zh: 邮件自动化 — 通过 curl SMTP/IMAP 收发邮件
entries.long_en: Automates sending and receiving email over SMTP/IMAP using curl.
entries.long_zh: 使用 curl 通过 SMTP/IMAP 自动收发邮件。
entries.sec_note_en: Handles mailbox credentials and sends real email — store secrets in env vars, never inline.
entries.sec_note_zh: 会处理邮箱凭据并发送真实邮件 — 密钥应存于环境变量，切勿内联硬编码。

entries.name: Emergency
entries.description_en: Developer emergency rescue — Git disasters, disk full, DB locks, credential leaks
entries.description_zh: 开发者应急救援 — Git 灾难、磁盘写满、数据库锁、凭据泄露
entries.long_en: A rescue playbook for developer emergencies: Git disasters, full disks, database locks, and credential-leak response.
entries.long_zh: 面向开发者紧急情况的救援手册：Git 灾难、磁盘写满、数据库锁与凭据泄露应对。
entries.sec_note_en: Suggests recovery commands that can mutate system/repo state — read each step before executing.
entries.sec_note_zh: 会建议可能改变系统/仓库状态的恢复命令 — 执行每一步前请先阅读。

entries.name: Git
entries.description_en: Git workflow — daily ops, advanced techniques, Aleph conventions
entries.description_zh: Git 工作流 — 日常操作、进阶技巧与 Aleph 约定
entries.long_en: Covers daily Git operations, advanced techniques, and Aleph's commit/branch conventions.
entries.long_zh: 涵盖日常 Git 操作、进阶技巧以及 Aleph 的提交/分支约定。
entries.sec_note_en: Runs git commands that modify repository history and working tree — review destructive operations first.
entries.sec_note_zh: 会运行修改仓库历史与工作区的 git 命令 — 破坏性操作请先审查。

entries.name: GitHub
entries.description_en: GitHub CLI automation — PR lifecycle, issues, CI debugging, releases via gh
entries.description_zh: GitHub CLI 自动化 — 通过 gh 管理 PR 生命周期、Issue、CI 调试与发布
entries.long_en: Automates the GitHub PR lifecycle, issues, CI debugging, and releases through the gh CLI.
entries.long_zh: 通过 gh CLI 自动化 GitHub 的 PR 生命周期、Issue、CI 调试与发布。
entries.sec_note_en: Acts on your GitHub account via gh — uses your authenticated token and can modify repos/PRs.
entries.sec_note_zh: 通过 gh 以你的 GitHub 账户执行操作 — 使用你的已认证令牌，可修改仓库/PR。

entries.name: HTTP Client
entries.description_en: API debugging/testing — RESTful requests, auth, response analysis via curl
entries.description_zh: API 调试/测试 — 通过 curl 发起 RESTful 请求、认证与响应分析
entries.long_en: Debugs and tests APIs by issuing RESTful requests with auth and analyzing responses via curl.
entries.long_zh: 通过 curl 发起带认证的 RESTful 请求并分析响应，用于 API 调试与测试。
entries.sec_note_en: Sends arbitrary HTTP requests with your credentials — avoid pointing at untrusted endpoints.
entries.sec_note_zh: 会携带你的凭据发送任意 HTTP 请求 — 避免指向不可信端点。

entries.name: Knowledge
entries.description_en: Knowledge distillation — Rephrasing Test, compress for retention
entries.description_zh: 知识蒸馏 — 复述测试，压缩以利记忆留存
entries.long_en: Distills knowledge using the Rephrasing Test and compression techniques for durable retention.
entries.long_zh: 运用复述测试与压缩技巧蒸馏知识，以实现持久的记忆留存。
entries.sec_note_en: Advisory skill — produces distilled notes only; no code execution.
entries.sec_note_zh: 纯建议型技能 — 仅产出蒸馏后的笔记，不执行任何代码。

entries.name: MCP Dev
entries.description_en: MCP Server development — agent-centric design, 4-phase workflow
entries.description_zh: MCP 服务器开发 — 以智能体为中心的设计，四阶段工作流
entries.long_en: Guides MCP server development with agent-centric design across a 4-phase workflow.
entries.long_zh: 以智能体为中心，按四阶段工作流指导 MCP 服务器开发。
entries.sec_note_en: Advisory/development skill — guides authoring; you build and run the server.
entries.sec_note_zh: 建议/开发型技能 — 引导编写，服务器由你构建并运行。

entries.name: Media Tools
entries.description_en: Media processing — video/audio/image via ffmpeg
entries.description_zh: 媒体处理 — 通过 ffmpeg 处理视频/音频/图像
entries.long_en: Processes video, audio, and images using ffmpeg for conversion, trimming, and extraction.
entries.long_zh: 使用 ffmpeg 处理视频、音频与图像，完成转换、裁剪与提取。
entries.sec_note_en: Requires a local ffmpeg install and reads/writes local media files.

entries.name: Notification
entries.description_en: Multi-channel notifications — macOS, ntfy.sh, Telegram, webhooks
entries.description_zh: 多渠道通知 — macOS、ntfy.sh、Telegram、Webhook
entries.long_en: Sends notifications across macOS, ntfy.sh, Telegram, and generic webhooks.
entries.long_zh: 通过 macOS、ntfy.sh、Telegram 与通用 Webhook 发送通知。
entries.sec_note_en: Sends messages to external services — keep channel tokens in env vars.
entries.sec_note_zh: 会向外部服务发送消息 — 渠道令牌请存于环境变量。

entries.name: Performance
entries.description_en: Performance optimization — measure first, profile, optimize with evidence
entries.description_zh: 性能优化 — 先度量、再剖析、用证据驱动优化
entries.long_en: Optimizes performance with a measure-first discipline: profile, find hot paths, and optimize with evidence.
entries.long_zh: 以先度量为原则优化性能：剖析、定位热点路径，并以证据驱动优化。
entries.sec_note_en: Advisory skill — guides profiling and analysis; no destructive operations.
entries.sec_note_zh: 纯建议型技能 — 引导剖析与分析，不进行破坏性操作。

entries.name: Plan
entries.description_en: Technical design — ambiguous requirements to ADR documentation
entries.description_zh: 技术设计 — 将模糊需求转化为 ADR 文档
entries.long_en: Turns ambiguous requirements into concrete technical designs documented as ADRs.
entries.long_zh: 将模糊需求转化为具体的技术设计，并以 ADR 形式记录。
entries.sec_note_en: Advisory skill — produces design documents only; no code execution.
entries.sec_note_zh: 纯建议型技能 — 仅产出设计文档，不执行任何代码。

entries.name: Playwright
entries.description_en: Browser automation — E2E testing, screenshots, form filling via Playwright
entries.description_zh: 浏览器自动化 — 通过 Playwright 进行 E2E 测试、截图与表单填写
entries.long_en: Automates the browser for E2E testing, screenshots, and form filling via Playwright.
entries.long_zh: 通过 Playwright 自动化浏览器，进行 E2E 测试、截图与表单填写。
entries.sec_note_en: Drives a real browser and can submit forms — point only at trusted/test targets.
entries.sec_note_zh: 会驱动真实浏览器并可能提交表单 — 仅指向可信/测试目标。

entries.name: Refactor
entries.description_en: Safe code refactoring — smell detection, test-protected incremental changes
entries.description_zh: 安全重构 — 坏味道识别、测试保护下的增量改动

entries.long_zh: 通过识别代码坏味道并在测试保护下进行增量改动，实现安全重构。
entries.sec_note_en: Modifies source code — keep changes under version control and tests green.
entries.sec_note_zh: 会修改源代码 — 请将改动纳入版本控制并保持测试通过。

entries.name: Regex
entries.description_en: Practical regex cookbook — validation/parsing/replacement across languages
entries.description_zh: 实用正则手册 — 跨语言的校验/解析/替换
entries.long_en: A practical regex cookbook for validation, parsing, and replacement across multiple languages.
entries.long_zh: 跨多种语言的实用正则手册，覆盖校验、解析与替换。
entries.sec_note_en: Advisory skill — beware catastrophic backtracking on untrusted input patterns.
entries.sec_note_zh: 纯建议型技能 — 对不可信输入应警惕灾难性回溯。

entries.name: Search
entries.description_en: Technical search strategies — code archaeology, doc retrieval, web research
entries.description_zh: 技术搜索策略 — 代码考古、文档检索与网络调研
entries.long_en: Provides technical search strategies for code archaeology, documentation retrieval, and web research.
entries.long_zh: 提供用于代码考古、文档检索与网络调研的技术搜索策略。
entries.sec_note_en: Advisory skill — guides search; may fetch external web content for research.
entries.sec_note_zh: 纯建议型技能 — 引导搜索；调研时可能抓取外部网页内容。

entries.name: Security
entries.description_en: Security audit — OWASP checklist, credential leak response, dependency scanning
entries.description_zh: 安全审计 — OWASP 检查清单、凭据泄露应对、依赖扫描
entries.long_en: Runs defensive security audits with an OWASP checklist, credential-leak response, and dependency scanning.
entries.long_zh: 执行防御性安全审计，包含 OWASP 检查清单、凭据泄露应对与依赖扫描。
entries.sec_note_en: Defensive auditing only — reports findings; does not exploit. Scans may read source and dependency manifests.
entries.sec_note_zh: 仅防御性审计 — 报告问题，不进行利用。扫描可能读取源码与依赖清单。

entries.name: Self
entries.description_en: Aleph self-management mode — configure LLM providers, channels, agents, skills, plugins
entries.description_zh: Aleph 自管理模式 — 配置 LLM 提供商、渠道、智能体、技能与插件
entries.long_en: Aleph's self-management mode for configuring LLM providers, channels, agents, skills, and plugins.
entries.long_zh: Aleph 的自管理模式，用于配置 LLM 提供商、渠道、智能体、技能与插件。
entries.sec_note_en: Modifies your Aleph instance configuration, including provider credentials — official first-party skill.
entries.sec_note_zh: 会修改你的 Aleph 实例配置（含提供商凭据）— 官方一方技能。

entries.name: Shell
entries.description_en: Scene-driven shell commands — system diagnostics, Docker, process management
entries.description_zh: 场景驱动的 Shell 命令 — 系统诊断、Docker 与进程管理
entries.long_en: Provides scene-driven shell commands for system diagnostics, Docker, and process management.
entries.long_zh: 提供面向场景的 Shell 命令，用于系统诊断、Docker 与进程管理。
entries.sec_note_en: Executes arbitrary shell commands on the host — review each command before running.
entries.sec_note_zh: 会在主机上执行任意 Shell 命令 — 运行前请审查每条命令。

entries.name: Skill Creator
entries.description_en: Create/refactor/evaluate Aleph skills, author memory skill-notes
entries.description_zh: 创建/重构/评估 Aleph 技能，撰写记忆型 skill-notes
entries.long_en: Creates, refactors, and evaluates Aleph skills, and authors memory skill-notes.
entries.long_zh: 创建、重构与评估 Aleph 技能，并撰写记忆型 skill-notes。
entries.sec_note_en: Writes skill files into your Aleph instance — official first-party skill.
entries.sec_note_zh: 会向你的 Aleph 实例写入技能文件 — 官方一方技能。

entries.name: SSH
entries.description_en: SSH management — connections, port forwarding, file transfer, jump hosts, keys
entries.description_zh: SSH 管理 — 连接、端口转发、文件传输、跳板机与密钥
entries.long_en: Manages SSH connections, port forwarding, file transfer, jump hosts, and key handling.
entries.long_zh: 管理 SSH 连接、端口转发、文件传输、跳板机与密钥。
entries.sec_note_en: Handles SSH credentials and opens remote connections — use trusted hosts and protect private keys.
entries.sec_note_zh: 会处理 SSH 凭据并建立远程连接 — 请使用可信主机并保护好私钥。

entries.name: Test
entries.description_en: Unified testing workflow — TDD cycles, framework selection, patterns
entries.description_zh: 统一测试工作流 — TDD 循环、框架选型与测试模式
entries.long_en: A unified testing workflow covering TDD cycles, framework selection, and common test patterns.
entries.long_zh: 统一的测试工作流，涵盖 TDD 循环、框架选型与常见测试模式。
entries.sec_note_en: Advisory skill — guides test authoring; tests run in your own environment.
entries.sec_note_zh: 纯建议型技能 — 引导编写测试；测试在你自己的环境中运行。

entries.name: Typeset
entries.description_en: Document rendering — compile Typst/LaTeX to PDF, math, templates
entries.description_zh: 文档排版 — 将 Typst/LaTeX 编译为 PDF，支持公式与模板
entries.long_en: Renders documents by compiling Typst/LaTeX to PDF with math and templates.
entries.long_zh: 通过将 Typst/LaTeX 编译为 PDF 进行文档排版，支持数学公式与模板。
entries.sec_note_en: Requires a local Typst/LaTeX toolchain and writes PDF output files.
entries.sec_note_zh: 需要本地 Typst/LaTeX 工具链，并会写出 PDF 文件。

entries.name: Web Scraper
entries.description_en: Web data extraction — structured scraping, search, PDF download via curl/Python
entries.description_zh: 网页数据提取 — 通过 curl/Python 进行结构化抓取、搜索与 PDF 下载
entries.long_en: Extracts web data through structured scraping, search, and PDF download using curl and Python.
entries.long_zh: 使用 curl 与 Python 进行结构化抓取、搜索与 PDF 下载，提取网页数据。
entries.sec_note_en: Fetches external web content — respect target robots/ToS and validate scraped data.
entries.sec_note_zh: 会抓取外部网页内容 — 请遵守目标站点 robots/服务条款并校验抓取数据。

entries.name: Aleph Diagnostics
entries.description_en: System health monitoring and performance diagnostics
entries.description_zh: 系统健康监控与性能诊断
entries.long_en: Official Aleph plugin that monitors system health and runs performance diagnostics for your instance.
entries.long_zh: Aleph 官方插件，监控系统健康状况并为你的实例运行性能诊断。
entries.sec_note_en: Reads runtime/system metrics to report health — official first-party plugin (Node.js).
entries.sec_note_zh: 读取运行时/系统指标以报告健康状况 — 官方一方插件（Node.js）。

entries.name: LLM Task Runner
entries.description_en: Batch LLM operations with map, chain, and evaluate
entries.description_zh: 批量 LLM 操作，支持 map、chain 与 evaluate
entries.long_en: Official Aleph plugin for batch LLM operations, supporting map, chain, and evaluate workflows.
entries.long_zh: Aleph 官方插件，用于批量 LLM 操作，支持 map、chain 与 evaluate 工作流。
entries.sec_note_en: Sends batched prompts to your configured LLM provider — may incur provider costs. Official first-party plugin (Node.js).
entries.sec_note_zh: 向你配置的 LLM 提供商发送批量请求 — 可能产生提供商费用。官方一方插件（Node.js）。

entries.name: Memory Analytics
entries.description_en: Memory usage analytics — fact distribution, timeline, and health assessment
entries.description_zh: 记忆使用分析 — 事实分布、时间线与健康评估
entries.long_en: Official Aleph plugin that analyzes memory usage: fact distribution, timeline, and health assessment.
entries.long_zh: Aleph 官方插件，分析记忆使用情况：事实分布、时间线与健康评估。
entries.sec_note_en: Reads your Aleph memory store to compute analytics — runs locally as WebAssembly. Official first-party plugin.
entries.sec_note_zh: 读取你的 Aleph 记忆库以计算分析指标 — 以 WebAssembly 在本地运行。官方一方插件。

entries.name: Diff Viewer
entries.description_en: Code diff comparison and change analysis
entries.description_zh: 代码差异对比与变更分析
entries.long_en: Official Aleph plugin for code diff comparison and change analysis.
entries.long_zh: Aleph 官方插件，用于代码差异对比与变更分析。
entries.sec_note_en: Reads file contents to compute diffs — runs locally as WebAssembly. Official first-party plugin.
entries.sec_note_zh: 读取文件内容以计算差异 — 以 WebAssembly 在本地运行。官方一方插件。

entries.name: Voice Call
entries.description_en: Voice calling framework with WebRTC/SIP stubs
entries.description_zh: 语音通话框架，含 WebRTC/SIP 桩实现
entries.long_en: Official Aleph plugin providing a voice calling framework with WebRTC/SIP stubs.
entries.long_zh: Aleph 官方插件，提供含 WebRTC/SIP 桩实现的语音通话框架。
entries.sec_note_en: Establishes voice connections via WebRTC/SIP — handles call credentials/endpoints. Official first-party plugin (Node.js).
entries.sec_note_zh: 通过 WebRTC/SIP 建立语音连接 — 会处理通话凭据/端点。官方一方插件（Node.js）。

entries.name: Phone Control
entries.description_en: Android phone control via ADB
entries.description_zh: 通过 ADB 控制 Android 手机
entries.long_en: Official Aleph plugin that controls an Android phone via ADB.
entries.long_zh: Aleph 官方插件，通过 ADB 控制 Android 手机。
entries.sec_note_en: Drives a connected Android device over ADB — can inject input events and read device state. Use only with your own trusted device. Official first-party plugin (Node.js).
entries.sec_note_zh: 通过 ADB 操控已连接的 Android 设备 — 可注入输入事件并读取设备状态。仅应用于你自己的可信设备。官方一方插件（Node.js）。

entries.name: Media Office
entries.description_en: Office document text, table, and metadata extraction
entries.description_zh: Office 文档文本、表格与元数据提取
entries.long_en: Official Aleph plugin for extracting text, tables, and metadata from Office documents.
entries.long_zh: Aleph 官方插件，从 Office 文档中提取文本、表格与元数据。
entries.sec_note_en: Reads local Office document files to extract content. Official first-party plugin (Node.js).
entries.sec_note_zh: 读取本地 Office 文档文件以提取内容。官方一方插件（Node.js）。
